---
title: "Laura Derksen"
image: avatar.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:laura.derksen@gmail.com
    - icon: file-earmark-text
      text: CV (PDF)
      href: Laura-Derksen-CV.pdf
---

I am a Senior Researcher at the [Ragnar Frisch Centre for Economic Research](https://www.frisch.uio.no/) in Oslo. I am affiliated with [J-PAL](https://www.povertyactionlab.org/) as an invited researcher and the [Development Learning Lab](https://www.devlearnlab.no/).

## Research Interests

- Health
- Education
- Development
- Information and Networks

## Contact

**Email:** [laura.derksen@gmail.com](mailto:laura.derksen@gmail.com)

**Affiliation:**\
Ragnar Frisch Centre for Economic Research\
Oslo, Norway
